1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones (gjentaksintervall = 200) intersecting Drammen municipality

3.description: Fetch buildings in Drammen municipality with status 'FA'

4.description: Join buildings (step 3) with flood zones (step 2) using ST_Intersects
